join_diagnostic.interpretation: Two-sided coverage means one independent witness fragment contains distinct non-overlapping attested n-grams also found in A and B. It is textual coverage, not a physical-fit score or proof of placement.

interpretation_limits: Same-CTH membership is catalog-assisted candidate selection, not proof of parallel wording.
Agreement with intentionally masked attested text measures recoverability under known context, not correctness on a real lacuna.
Variant-only witness middles are alternatives or omissions, not errors by default.
The join diagnostic is textual coverage, not physical-fit evidence or a join score.
